description: Median throughput overhead from paired JFR experiments. JFR files in data/jfr/overhead/. Each subject ran 5 reps x 60s under no-JFR, JFR-default, and JFR-0ms configs. Overhead = 1 - median(JFR-0ms throughput) / median(no-JFR throughput). Bootstrap 95% CI over 30 paired runs.
note: Bootstrap 95% CI on 30 paired 60s runs per subject per config.
